message:
fix(tmux): use proper control key functions instead of SendKeys

SendKeys uses the -l (literal) flag, which sends characters literally
rather than interpreting them as tmux key names. This means calling
SendKeys(target, "C-c", false) was sending the literal string "C-c"
(three characters) instead of the Ctrl+C key sequence.

Changes:
- Add SendEOF function for sending Ctrl+D (EOF) to a pane
- Fix health.go to use SendInterrupt instead of SendKeys for Ctrl+C
- Fix health.go to use SendEOF instead of SendKeys for Ctrl+D

This ensures soft/hard restart operations actually send the control
key sequences to interrupt and terminate agent processes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
